meta.update_rule: Update both this file and WAVE-2-PROGRESS-TRACKER.md together when phase state changes. This file is the machine-readable projection of the .md; it does not own truth. Update parent ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json cursor when Wave 2 active_phase changes.
meta.reading_order: cursor → direction → phases → deferred_register → validation_matrix → open_decisions. Read roadmap_ref for phase deliverables and exit gates. Read parent_tracker_ref for Wave 1 history and Wave 2 entry criteria.

principles: Transport before consumers — no projection consumer PRD may be initiated until its required producer path exists and I1–I4 are verified. Phase 2.3 does not start before Phase 2.1 gates.

Producers expand one category at a time — Class A adjustment ships separately from Dependency Events. Within a category, intra-category parity applies: fills and credits are a symmetric Dependency Event rollout pair (ADR-055 / RULE-6 / FIB-H §G) and must land in the same slice.
ADR-055 parity is not relaxed — the exemplar proved Class A and Class B simultaneously. Subsequent expansion slices must still satisfy parity within each slice boundary.

Consumers are projection-only — no consumer slice may write to PFT, the grind authoring store, or any other authoring table. Consumers write only to projection stores and processed_messages. origin_label travels from authoring boundary to consumer unchanged.
Gates are pass/fail — each phase has a hard exit condition. No partial advancement. Phase N+1 PRD must land before Phase N+1 code begins.

No scope expansion without FIB amendment — FIB-S downstream_expansion_allowed_without_amendment: false applies to every phase. Any new operator-visible outcome, external consumer contract, or new surface not in the containment loop requires a FIB amendment.
Freeze discipline holds — ADR-052 through ADR-056 are frozen. If a phase surfaces a real conflict, write a superseding ADR. Do not patch frozen docs silently.
direction.execution_protocol: Every phase runs: /prd-writer → /lead-architect (EXEC-SPEC scaffold) → /build PRD-###. /build-pipeline dispatches domain-expert skills per workstream. No skill is invoked directly outside the build-pipeline chain. See WAVE-2-ROLLOUT-MAP.md §3.
direction.phase_transition_rule: Exiting Phase N → Opening Phase N+1 requires two documents: (1) Phase N exit gate met, (2) Phase N+1 PRD drafted and approved. No code written for Phase N+1 before its PRD lands.
non_goals: No CDC / WAL relay (Debezium, pg_logical, WAL streaming) — post-pilot scale upgrade
No external consumer contract — no public event bus, no third-party event semantics, no reconciliation interface
No event sourcing — outbox does not reconstruct authoritative state
No authoritative totals — no Total Drop, shift-end settlement, or final money position
No multi-consumer fan-out registry — Wave 2 assumes a single internal consumer path
No UI-driven reconciliation — render completeness labels; never recompute financial state against authoring stores
No compliance domain scope — mtl_entry / MTLService remains parallel and isolated
No new PFT columns — player_financial_transaction is append-only
wave_2_entry_criteria: I1–I4 harness proven against real implementation — met 2026-05-11 (EXEC-081)

phases.purpose: Runtime validation gate proving I1–I5 against a real running Supabase instance before Phase 2.1 authorization. No business behavior change. Produces signed evidence artifact with decision field.

transport_bugs_fixed.root_cause: ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE — player_financial_transaction_no_updates (USING=false) rejects DO UPDATE on conflict-resolution scan path even without a real conflict (PostgreSQL 17 behavior with partial index targets)
transport_bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to DO NOTHING + SELECT fallback for idempotency replay

transport_bugs_fixed.root_cause: Migration 20260511134200 added event_type NOT NULL to table_buyin_telemetry but did not update this AFTER INSERT trigger
transport_bugs_fixed.fix: Added v_event_type = buyin.observed for RATED_BUYIN and RATED_ADJUSTMENT kinds

transport_bugs_fixed.root_cause: Same ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE denial-policy issue as Bug-1
transport_bugs_fixed.fix: Same DO NOTHING fix — adjustment RPC ready for Phase 2.1 outbox extension

transport_bugs_fixed.root_cause: Migration 20260511134100 assumed SECURITY DEFINER RPCs for all outbox writes, but rpc_create_financial_txn is SECURITY INVOKER (ADR-040); no INSERT policy = default deny for authenticated role
transport_bugs_fixed.fix: Added finance_outbox_insert_staff INSERT policy + GRANT INSERT ON finance_outbox TO authenticated

semantic_contract.authority_conflation_forbidden: origin_label must not be upgraded to actual by any consumer

phases.label: First Consumer Slice: Lifecycle-Aware Completeness Projection
phases.entry_gate: Phase 2.1 exit (Class A adjustment producer wired)
phases.scope: First projection consumer. Resolves DEC-1: all visit-level financial aggregates currently emit completeness.status: unknown because the system has no lifecycle-aware projection mechanism. This slice builds the consumer infrastructure that makes complete and partial completeness signals possible.

dec_1_resolution.root_cause: mtl_gaming_day_summary view and player_financial_transaction aggregates have no gaming-day lifecycle column signaling when a gaming day is closed
dec_1_resolution.resolution_approach: Projection store for visit-level Class A financial state + gaming-day lifecycle signal + consumer reading buyin.recorded, cashout.recorded, adjustment.recorded

phases.authority_rule: All three event types carry origin_label: estimated. Mixed-class surfaces aggregating alongside Class A events must degrade to estimated (Actual > Observed > Estimated). No surface may show a combined operational + ledger total without degradation labeling.

governance_rules.phase_entry: Every phase requires PRD drafted & approved → EXEC-SPEC scaffolded → /build-pipeline executed to exit criteria. Tracker checkbox completion does NOT authorize starting the next phase.
governance_rules.skill_dispatch: Skills are dispatched by /build-pipeline, not invoked directly. See WAVE-2-ROLLOUT-MAP.md §3.
governance_rules.parity_rule: ADR-055 is not relaxed. No asymmetric rollout. Fills and credits are a symmetric Dependency Event rollout pair — intra-category parity; they must land in the same slice. Dependency Events must carry origin_label: estimated — not upgradeable.
governance_rules.frozen_docs: ADR-052–056 are frozen. Violations require a superseding ADR — not patches to frozen docs.
governance_rules.i1_scope: I1 atomicity is producer-scoped. Every new producer must ship with an explicit atomicity proof test. The exemplar proof does not certify future producers.
governance_rules.i2_i3_i4_scope: I2–I4 are transport-substrate invariants. Proven once at relay/consumer architecture level. Re-verify only if relay worker, ordering guarantee, or idempotent-consumer implementation changes materially.
governance_rules.teardown_rule: PRD-082 harness teardown migration must be authored and applied before any Phase 2.1 migration merges. See TEARDOWN-ARTIFACT-PRD-082.md.
